name: Aditya Dagar
title: Systems Engineer
subtitle: AI Engineer · Researcher · Builder
tagline: I work at the intersection of computation, intelligence, and design.

current_direction.headline: Current Direction
current_direction.body: Building toward a deeper understanding of systems — whether they are made of memory addresses, distributed machines, neural networks, or people. I care less about frameworks and more about foundations.

projects.name: HTTP/1.0 Server
projects.description: A minimal HTTP/1.0 server built from POSIX sockets. An exercise in understanding the protocol at the byte level — parsing raw requests, managing file descriptors, and building reliable I/O without abstraction.

projects.name: Multithreaded HTTP/1.1
projects.description: Extends the HTTP/1.0 work to concurrent connections using pthreads. Persistent connections, thread pools, and careful synchronization. Where systems programming meets performance engineering.

projects.name: SHA-256
projects.description: A ground-up implementation of SHA-256 in C. The goal was not a working hash function — it was understanding why the algorithm is constructed the way it is. Cryptography as systems study.

projects.name: SERA
projects.description: An AI-powered Life Operating System. An ongoing attempt to build software that transforms intention into consistent action. Architecture-first, model-agnostic.

notes: Simplicity is not the absence of complexity. It is complexity brought under control.
Every abstraction should justify its existence.
